title: Hiring Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
